title: bupleurum dalhousianum
intro: Bupleurum dalhousianum, also known as Himalayan bupleurum, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. It is a member of the carrot family (Apiaceae) and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum dalhousianum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Bupleurum dalhousianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
